title: Visualizing Group Axioms and Properties
description: A flowchart illustrating the core axioms of a group and how they lead to fundamental group properties, connecting to the Pearson Education curriculum.
relationships: The Set G and Binary Operation * must satisfy Closure
Closure, Associativity, Identity, and Inverse together define a Group
A Group that also satisfies Commutativity is an Abelian Group
Subgroups and Cyclic Groups are specific types of Groups with additional structure
